description: Mock application packet: Zafran Foods Trading LLC, a Dubai mainland Legal Person - Incorporated (UAE Private Company) wholesaling spices, registering for Corporate Tax and obtaining a TRN. All values are fabricated illustrative data (not a real business, TRN, Emirates ID, or passport), constructed to exercise every conditional branch: entityType=legal_person_incorporated with entitySubType=uae_private_company_incl_establishment and a trade license (exercises the Main License Details block, since this Entity Type is not on the government-entity trade-license-exclusion list), isQualifyingPublicBenefitEntity=false (base-case negative branch), ownerType=natural_person with ownerHasEmiratesId=true (the sole individual owner, 100% shareholding), hasBranchesInUae=false (base-case negative branch), and authorizedSignatoryHasEmiratesId=false (exercises the Passport block). The generator also exercises four negative/alternate branches directly against the condition evaluator: entityType=natural_person (country/date-of-incorporation/tax-period/certificate-of-incorporation correctly not required), entityType=legal_person_federal_government_entity (trade license fields correctly not required, decreeLawDocument correctly required), isQualifyingPublicBenefitEntity=true (cabinetDecisionDocument correctly required), and authorizedSignatoryHasEmiratesId=true (Emirates ID fields correctly required instead of Passport fields).

data.tradeLicenseIssuingAuthority: Dubai Department of Economy and Tourism
data.businessActivityName: Trading in spices and food seasonings
